formula_skeleton: Delta_p = straight_developing_reference(Re,L_plus,geometry,property_mode) plus optional named local loss after recovery
required_inputs: signed throughflow; static/reduced pressure basis; hydraulic diameter; branch length; reset distance; temperature-dependent properties; orientation; heat/source labels
nondimensional_groups: Re; Pr; Gr; Ri; Ra; Gz; L_plus
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Primary constants and exact convention still require verification for the active branch and salt-property mode
exclusion_criteria: persistent local reverse area/mass; near-zero throughflow; missing pressure basis; missing reset distance
provenance_author_title: Shah and London 1971; Shah 1978; Muzychka and Yovanovich 2004/2009

formula_skeleton: K_section_effective = 2*Delta_p_residual/(rho*U_basis^2) after hydrostatic kinetic straight/development subtraction
required_inputs: static pressure endpoints; velocity basis; rho; straight/developing reference; hydrostatic and kinetic corrections; recovery length; reverse-flow metrics; same-QOI UQ
nondimensional_groups: Re; geometry ratios; split ratio; recovery length/D; reverse area fraction; reverse mass fraction
branch_applicability: diagnostic section or close-coupled cluster only
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Literature supports decomposition method; no TAMU component coefficient admitted
exclusion_criteria: failed reverse-flow gate; invalid straight-reference subtraction; missing same-QOI UQ; corner two-tap rows used as component fit evidence
provenance_author_title: NIST TN 2206; Csizmadia and Hos 2014; Salehi Idem and Sleiti 2017

formula_skeleton: momentum balance over signed branches with path-specific K_i and branch head terms
required_inputs: branch topology; signed branch flows; junction pressures; path lengths; path K/head terms; property mode
nondimensional_groups: Re_i; split ratios; elevation heads; branch sign
branch_applicability: only if a discrete branch changes net direction
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Architecture is literature-supported but not triggered by local cross-sectional exchange alone
exclusion_criteria: dominant local recirculation inside a section; missing branch topology; hidden multiplier calibration
provenance_author_title: Zhang Wang Wu Codde Schmandt network sources

formula_skeleton: energy and momentum residual split into throughflow ledger plus exchange term m_dot_ex*(T_recirc-T_main) and pressure exchange residual
required_inputs: main-stream flow and temperature; recirculation volume; exchange mass flow; residence time; wall/source terms; reverse metrics; residual ledger
nondimensional_groups: Re; Ri; Gr; Gz; reverse area fraction; reverse mass fraction; residence-time group
branch_applicability: upcomer and heated-incline zones with persistent local exchange
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Architecture supported by compartment/exchange literature but coefficient values are not source-transferable
exclusion_criteria: attempting universal exchange coefficient; no recirculation metric; no same-QOI thermal/pressure residual linkage
provenance_author_title: Delafosse and Tajsoleiman exchange sources; Patino Jaramillo 2022 flow-field paper

required_inputs: Re; Pr; hydraulic diameter; thermal entrance length; wall heat/source boundary class; branch geometry; property mode
nondimensional_groups: Re; Pr; Gz; L_plus; aspect ratio
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Constants and boundary-condition definitions need primary-source verification
exclusion_criteria: mixed convection dominance; recirculation; missing wall/source boundary class; nonuniform heating outside source envelope

formula_skeleton: Nu = Nu_mixed(Re,Pr,Gr_or_Ri,Gz,L/D,BC) only within source envelope
required_inputs: Re; Pr; Gr or Ri; Gz; L/D; inclination/orientation; wall boundary class; property mode
nondimensional_groups: Re; Pr; Gr; Ri; Gz; L/D
branch_applicability: conditional heated branches if source envelope overlaps
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Method lane only until exact source constants and TAMU overlap are verified
exclusion_criteria: HITEC-specific transfer; unknown fluid/property basis; recirculation; outside Re/Pr/Gr/Ri/Gz envelope
provenance_author_title: Everts and Meyer 2020; Everts Mahdavi and Meyer 2023; Chen 2017 as conditional only

required_inputs: geometry; wall material/thickness; external boundary class; emissivity; ambient condition; source/sink labels
nondimensional_groups: Bi; Ra_ext; emissivity/radiation group; thermal resistance ratios
branch_applicability: external BC heat-loss and setup-only source/sink documentation
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Admissible as setup-only accounting after labels; not an internal Nu fit
exclusion_criteria: using heat loss to tune internal Nu; document-only rows promoted to fit rows; missing source/sink provenance

formula_skeleton: Delta_p_unsteady = Delta_p_quasi_steady plus periodic correction term
required_inputs: time-resolved flow; periodicity evidence; positive mean flow; no sign crossing; fitting geometry; pressure basis
nondimensional_groups: Re_m; Womersley or frequency group; amplitude ratio
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Only if periodic positive-mean assumptions are met
exclusion_criteria: startup transient; topology change; zero crossing; quasi-steady diagnostic residual fitting

formula_skeleton: reduced basis maps state coefficients to pressure/thermal residual fields after supervised data sufficiency
required_inputs: snapshot fields; state labels; projection basis; train/validation/holdout split; UQ
nondimensional_groups: POD energy; residual norm; regime labels
validity_range_or_source_envelope: Requires many admissible snapshots and frozen split policy
exclusion_criteria: using ROM to hide missing physics; sparse data; changing model after validation
provenance_author_title: ROM/POD literature lane from untried forms inventory
